# Q3 Strategy Overview

## Market Expansion

We achieved significant growth in EMEA markets this quarter.
Key drivers include new distribution channels and partner programs.

## Cost Initiatives

Cost reduction programs are tracking ahead of plan.
Key savings areas: infrastructure, vendor renegotiation, headcount optimization.

## Team Updates

Three senior hires completed. Two departures managed smoothly.
Headcount now at 142 full-time employees.
